name: The Duke of Death and His Maid
original_name: 死神坊ちゃんと黒メイド
overview: Due to a childhood curse, anything that the Duke touches will die - which makes his flirty maid’s behavior all the more shocking! Can the Duke and his companions break the curse, or is he doomed to a life where love is forever out of his reach?

trailers.title: The Duke of Death and His Maid | Official PV
